rationale: Semantic consequence is defined as 'every model of Gamma is also a model of phi', so the load-bearing notion is the model relation (def:axiom-systems-model), which was missing. The listed def:axiom-systems-theory is removed: Gamma is an arbitrary set of premises, not a deductively-closed theory, and consequence is defined for any such Gamma.
licensing_quote:
if every model of $\Gamma$ is also a
model of $\varphi$
notes: The 'Equivalently, there is no structure ... true ... false' clause is the model-free unfolding via def:axiom-systems-structure + def:axiom-systems-satisfaction; those are candidate edges if the reviewer prefers the structure/satisfaction phrasing over the model phrasing. Gamma and phi being sentences (def:sentence) is ambient typing.
